title: [BUG] Excel.Table does not expose correct properties
author: DPWalther

comments.author: skypesky
comments.body:
@DPWalther 
Can you provide a sample excel file and sample code?

comments.author: Windigo
comments.body: I have the exact same issue. Same as worksheet.addTable(props...) should return the tabel, but it returns an object with worksheet and table, not the table as we should expect

comments.author: GaryHyland
comments.body: That prob explains why I get a corrupted XLSX if I try and use sheet.addTable(...).getColumns(1).name = 'abc' also.
